evidence: "Incredibly inspiring story about a woman who has clearly made her mark in our country."
"Thank you, Amazon, for bringing us this terrific documentary of a REAL person who broke the barriers to get his message across."
"The first episode I watched, my head was reeling with all the 'time warp' flashbacks."
"The writing and plot are quite unique - very imaginative."
"Exhausting! Very sad, full of turmoil, guilt, regret."
"Kept us on the edge of our seats at home."
"Excellent acting/directing. A story that all our teens should be encouraged to watch."
"The direction is flawless, the acting is superb, and the message is loud and clear."
"My hat's off to her. And Nicole Kidman!"
"This is one of the most beautiful and touching movies I've seen in a while."
"A tremendous and powerful portrayal of a politician trampling over civil rights and constitutional rights."
"It truly is amazing that he was able to control his addictions and found love and happiness at last."
"A real story of courage, bravery, and survival instincts."

summary: The user shows a strong preference for biographical and documentary genres, appreciating complex narratives and high production quality. They value emotional resonance in storytelling and have a mixed response to pacing, indicating a preference for engaging and thought-provoking content.
